protocol.top_relative_gap_definition: 1 - score(candidate) / score(top1); this is the existing Margin Guard scale
protocol.quality_gate_semantics: PASS validates reproducible distribution statistics and safety isolation; it does not validate Cognitive value or authorize a new threshold

decision.hermes_recommendation: Do not enter Hermes: the locked 0.08 Margin Guard has zero natural authority on the frozen workload; use this distribution baseline to design a separately pre-registered authority study.

conclusion: Phase 6.2 establishes a descriptive RecallEngine score-distribution baseline. No ranking, Cognitive algorithm, threshold, runtime, or Hermes integration was changed.
